creator: marcarianalexandru@gmail.com
text:
www/node is broken at the moment on the quarterly branch (2020Q3) due to a new dependency( it requires brotli>=1.0.9,1 ) while the branch itself only provides brotli-1.0.7_2,1. ( https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/branches/2020Q3/archivers/brotli/distinfo?revision=541028&view=markup )

===>   node-14.11.0 depends on package: brotli>=1.0.9,1 - not found
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/www/node

https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports/branches/2020Q3/www/node/Makefile?r1=541028&r2=548876
